name: Pasta with Cream Truffle Sauce and Fresh Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flour (70% semolina, 30% all-purpose, rice, or buckwheat)
recipeInstructions:
SAUCE:
Melt butter in a sauté pan. Add mushrooms, shallot puree, peppercorns, and bay leaves. Reduce mixture over high heat for about 2 minutes.
Add chicken stock and continue cooking over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add cream, bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce by one-third and make it smooth. Adjust seasoning as needed.
In another sauté pan, add Madeira wine to 3 tablespoons of truffles. Reduce over high heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
Strain the cream sauce into the truffles and wine, then reduce it to a smooth consistency.
ASSEMBLY:
Cook pasta in plain boiling water until al dente, then drain. Heat olive oil with chopped truffles, salt, and pepper in a sauté pan. Add pasta and a little cream truffle sauce, heating.
Sauté sliced Cepes, Shitake, and Chanterelle mushrooms in olive oil. Strain.
Serve by ladling some sauce onto a plate, swirling pasta in the center, and garnishing with a quarter of the sauteed mushrooms and chopped truffles.
